name: 惡毒女配（心機搶婚女）
description: 自我標榜為男方未婚妻，自視甚高、欺凌女主。最終在女主身份揭露時崩潰。核心功能是製造女主被欺壓的情境，為後續打臉蓄力。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Bro, I'm the one who's your fiancée. Come on, just say it. / Like you actually deserve it. / Gun, stop deluding yourself. You want to marry into a rich family? You're not even in the league.
examples.context: 自我標榜為男方未婚妻，自視甚高、欺凌女主。最終在女主身份揭露時崩潰。核心功能是製造女主被欺壓的情境，為後續打臉蓄力。
